summary: Add minimal package.json to opencode-memory-bus (empty spike package) and wire 5 custom MCP servers (dashboard-launcher, memory-graph, model-router-x, context-governor, runbooks) into opencode.json as disabled local servers
root_cause: opencode-memory-bus had no package.json (only spike/ dir); 5 custom MCP servers were defined in mcp-servers/opencode-mcp-config.json but not in the main opencode.json config
fix_approach: Added minimal package.json with private:true for memory-bus; added 5 MCP server entries to opencode.json mcp section as disabled (enabled:false) local servers with node command

validation.notes: MCP servers are disabled by default — enable individually when ready to use
